🎬
Installer Bobine Accès rapide depuis l'écran d'accueil
Installer Bobine sur votre iPhone
  • 1Appuyez sur le bouton Partager ⎋
  • 2Faites défiler et appuyez sur "Sur l'écran d'accueil"
  • 3Appuyez sur "Ajouter" en haut à droite
🎬

Bobine

Je lis dans vos pensées cinématographiques

Pensez à un film — n'importe lequel.
Je vais vous poser quelques questions et deviner lequel c'est.

Musique : OFF
Bobine

1. Pensez à un film — de n'importe quelle époque.

2. Répondez honnêtement par Oui, Non, ou Je ne sais pas.

3. Plus vous répondez vite, meilleur est votre score.

4. Je dois trouver votre film en 25 questions max !

Bobine
Q 1 / 20
Films restants : —
Question
Chargement…
Bobine Q — / 20
✦  Je pense que c'est…
—
—
🏆
Trouvé !

Je savais que j'allais y arriver.

⭐ Score : —
—
—
🎭
Je m'avoue vaincu…

Vous avez pensé à un film que je ne connais pas encore, ou qui est vraiment très rare !

Duquel s'agissait-il ?

--red: #e05a5a; --green: #5ab87a; --radius: 16px; --radius-sm: 10px; } * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } html, body { height: 100%; height: 100dvh; } body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); min-height: 100vh; min-height: 100dvh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 20px 16px; padding-top: max(20px, env(safe-area-inset-top)); padding-bottom: max(20px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); overflow-x: hidden; } body::before { content: ''; position: fixed; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% -10%, rgba(201,168,76,0.08) 0%, transparent 60%); pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; } /* ── SPLASH SCREEN ── */ #splash { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: var(--bg); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 100; transition: opacity 0.5s ease, visibility 0.5s ease; } #splash.hidden { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; } .splash-reel { width: 80px; height: 80px; margin-bottom: 24px; animation: spin 2s linear infinite; } @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } .splash-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 36px; color: var(--gold-light); letter-spacing: -1px; } .splash-sub { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 8px; font-weight: 300; } /* ── BANNIÈRE INSTALL ── */ #install-banner { position: fixed; bottom: max(16px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); left: 16px; right: 16px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; z-index: 50; animation: slideUp 0.4s ease both; max-width: 420px; margin: 0 auto; } @keyframes slideUp { from { transform: translateY(20px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } } #install-banner.hidden { display: none; } .install-icon { font-size: 24px; flex-shrink: 0; } .install-text { flex: 1; } .install-text strong { display: block; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text); font-weight: 500; } .install-text span { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); } .install-btn { background: var(--gold); color: #1a1200; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; white-space: nowrap; } .install-close { background: none; border: none; color: var(--text-muted); cursor: pointer; font-size: 18px; padding: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; } /* ── BANNIÈRE iOS ── */ #ios-banner { position: fixed; bottom: max(16px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); left: 16px; right: 16px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 16px; z-index: 50; animation: slideUp 0.4s ease both; max-width: 420px; margin: 0 auto; } #ios-banner.hidden { display: none; } .ios-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 10px; } .ios-steps { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ios-steps li { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); } .ios-step-num { width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold-dim); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3); color: var(--gold); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .ios-close { background: none; border: none; color: var(--text-muted); cursor: pointer; font-size: 18px; position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 14px; } /* ── SCREENS ── */ .screen { width: 100%; max-width: 420px; position: relative; z-index: 1; animation: fadeUp 0.4s ease both; } @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(18px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } /* ── INTRO ── */ .intro-logo { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 40px; } .intro-logo .clap { font-size: 52px; display: block; margin-bottom: 12px; animation: pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes pulse { 0%,100% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.06); } } .intro-logo h1 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 38px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -1px; color: var(--gold-light); } .intro-logo p { font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 6px; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 0.5px; } .intro-card { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 28px 24px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .intro-card p { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.65; color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; } .intro-card p em { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-style: italic; color: var(--text); } /* ── BOUTONS ── */ .btn { width: 100%; padding: 16px 20px; border: none; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s, opacity 0.15s; letter-spacing: 0.2px; } .btn:active { transform: scale(0.97); opacity: 0.85; } .btn-primary { background: var(--gold); color: #1a1200; } .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--gold-light); } .btn-ghost { background: var(--surface2); color: var(--text-muted); border: 1px solid var(--border); margin-top: 10px; } .btn-ghost:hover { color: var(--text); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); } /* ── HEADER JEU ── */ .game-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 24px; } .game-logo { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 18px; color: var(--gold); } .q-counter { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface2); padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid var(--border); } /* ── PROGRESS ── */ .progress-bar { height: 3px; background: var(--surface2); border-radius: 2px; margin-bottom: 28px; overflow: hidden; } .progress-fill { height: 100%; background: var(--gold); border-radius: 2px; transition: width 0.5s ease; } /* ── FILMS RESTANTS ── */ .films-count { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 20px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); } .films-count span { color: var(--gold); font-weight: 500; } /* ── CARTE QUESTION ── */ .question-card { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 28px 24px 24px; margin-bottom: 16px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .question-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold), transparent); opacity: 0.5; } .question-label { font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 14px; font-weight: 500; } .question-text { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.35; color: var(--text); } /* ── BOUTONS RÉPONSE ── */ .answers { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .answer-btn { padding: 14px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; text-align: center; } .answer-btn:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .answer-btn.oui { color: var(--green); border-color: rgba(90,184,122,0.3); } .answer-btn.non { color: var(--red); border-color: rgba(224,90,90,0.3); } .answer-btn.oui:hover { background: rgba(90,184,122,0.1); border-color: var(--green); } .answer-btn.non:hover { background: rgba(224,90,90,0.1); border-color: var(--red); } .btn-nsp { width: 100%; padding: 12px; background: transparent; border: 1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); color: var(--text-muted); font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .btn-nsp:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); color: var(--text); } /* ── DEVINETTE ── */ .guess-card { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.25); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 28px 24px; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 16px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .guess-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 50% 0%, rgba(201,168,76,0.07), transparent); } .guess-label { font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 16px; font-weight: 500; } .guess-film { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 8px; line-height: 1.2; } .guess-meta { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 24px; } .guess-actions { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; } .btn-yes { background: rgba(90,184,122,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(90,184,122,0.35); color: var(--green); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .btn-no { background: rgba(224,90,90,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(224,90,90,0.3); color: var(--red); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .btn-yes:hover { background: rgba(90,184,122,0.25); } .btn-no:hover { background: rgba(224,90,90,0.22); } .btn-yes:active, .btn-no:active { transform: scale(0.96); } /* ── RÉSULTAT ── */ .result-icon { font-size: 56px; text-align: center; display: block; margin-bottom: 16px; } .result-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 26px; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 8px; color: var(--text); } .result-sub { text-align: center; font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 28px; line-height: 1.5; } .result-film-card { background: var(--surface2); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 16px 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; border: 1px solid var(--border); } .result-film-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 20px; color: var(--gold-light); margin-bottom: 4px; } .result-film-meta { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); } .score-badge { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: var(--gold-dim); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3); border-radius: 20px; padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--gold-light); width: fit-content; margin: 0 auto 24px; } /* ── ABANDON ── */ .surrender-card { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 28px 24px; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 16px; } .surrender-icon { font-size: 48px; display: block; margin-bottom: 14px; } .surrender-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 22px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .surrender-text { font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 20px; line-height: 1.6; } .hidden { display: none !important; } .fade-in { animation: fadeUp 0.35s ease both; }
Bobine

Installer Bobine Accès rapide depuis l'écran d'accueil
Installer Bobine sur votre iPhone
  • 1Appuyez sur le bouton Partager ⎋
  • 2Faites défiler et appuyez sur "Sur l'écran d'accueil"
  • 3Appuyez sur "Ajouter" en haut à droite

Bobine

2. Répondez honnêtement par Oui, Non, ou Je ne sais pas.

3. Plus vous répondez vite, meilleur est votre score.

4. Je dois trouver votre film en 20 questions max !

border: 1px solid rgba(90,184,122,0.35); color: var(--green); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .btn-no { background: rgba(224,90,90,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(224,90,90,0.3); color: var(--red); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .btn-yes:hover { background: rgba(90,184,122,0.25); } .btn-no:hover { background: rgba(224,90,90,0.22); } .btn-yes:active, .btn-no:active { transform: scale(0.96); } /* ── RÉSULTAT ── */ .result-icon { font-size: 56px; text-align: center; display: block; margin-bottom: 16px; } .result-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 26px; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 8px; color: var(--text); } .result-sub { text-align: center; font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 28px; line-height: 1.5; } .result-film-card { background: var(--surface2); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 16px 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; border: 1px solid var(--border); } .result-film-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 20px; color: var(--gold-light); margin-bottom: 4px; } .result-film-meta { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); } .score-badge { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: var(--gold-dim); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3); border-radius: 20px; padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--gold-light); width: fit-content; margin: 0 auto 24px; } /* ── ABANDON ── */ .surrender-card { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 28px 24px; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 16px; } .surrender-icon { font-size: 48px; display: block; margin-bottom: 14px; } .surrender-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 22px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .surrender-text { font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 20px; line-height: 1.6; } .hidden { display: none !important; } .fade-in { animation: fadeUp 0.35s ease both; }

Installer Bobine Accès rapide depuis l'écran d'accueil
Installer Bobine sur votre iPhone
  • 1Appuyez sur le bouton Partager ⎋
  • 2Faites défiler et appuyez sur "Sur l'écran d'accueil"

Bobine

Je lis dans vos pensées cinématographiques

Pensez à un film — n'importe lequel.
Je vais vous poser quelques questions et deviner lequel c'est.

Bobine

1. Pensez à un film — de n'importe quelle époque.

2. Répondez honnêtement par Oui, Non, ou Je ne sais pas.

3. Plus vous répondez vite, meilleur est votre score.

4. Je dois trouver votre film en 20 questions max !
